ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "pretty_formula" TEXT /* The pretty formula representation of the material */,
  "final_energy" REAL /* The final calculated energy of the material */,
  "e_above_hull" REAL /* The energy above the convex hull, indicating stability */,
  "spacegroup_number" INTEGER /* The number of the space group to which the material belongs */,
  "volume" REAL /* The volume of the unit cell of the material */,
  "full_formula" TEXT /* The full chemical formula of the material */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the material entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The last modification date of the material entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the material data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the material (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_spacegroup_number FOREIGN KEY ("spacegroup_number") REFERENCES spacegroups ("spacegroup_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "icsd" (
  "icsd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICSD entry */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material with this ICSD ID */,
  "icsd_entry_date" TEXT /* The date when the ICSD entry was recorded */,
  "icsd_source" TEXT /* The source of the ICSD data (e.g., ICSD database, user-submitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icsd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icsd_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacegroups" (
  "spacegroup_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space group */,
  "spacegroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the space group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the space group */,
  "crystal_system" TEXT /* The crystal system of the space group */,
  "point_group" TEXT /* The point group of the space group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacegroup_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data entry */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material for which this energy data is recorded */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy calculation (e.g., total energy, band gap) */,
  "energy_value" REAL /* The value of the energy calculation */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* The method used for energy calculations */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* The date when the energy data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_data" (
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stability data entry */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material for which this stability data is recorded */,
  "stability_type" TEXT /* Type of stability metric (e.g., energy above hull) */,
  "stability_value" REAL /* The value of the stability metric */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* The method used for stability calculations */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* The date when the stability data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stability_data_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_data" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume data entry */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material for which this volume data is recorded */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* The volume of the unit cell */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* The method used for volume calculations */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* The date when the volume data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_data_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formula_data" (
  "formula_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formula data entry */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material for which this formula data is recorded */,
  "pretty_formula" TEXT /* The pretty formula representation */,
  "full_formula" TEXT /* The full chemical formula */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the formula data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formula_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formula_data_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "material_id" TEXT /* Reference to the material for which this version is recorded */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* The version number of the material data */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* The date when the material data was revised */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The version status (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the material for which this revision is recorded */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the changes made in this revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* The user who approved the revision (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The revision status (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_revisions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES material_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
